title: Dynamic query combining 3 filters with explicit case-match
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.Search.filter/1` that takes a keyword list like `[role: "admin", active: true, team_id: 5]`. All are optional. Use `Enum.reduce/3` over the keyword list with an explicit case-match on `{key, value}` pairs: `:role`, `:active`, `:team_id`. Skip unknown keys with an `_` catch-all branch. Return the queryable (don't call Repo.all). Write to `lib/my_app/blog/search.ex`.
tier_rationale: Tuple-destructure case matching inside Enum.reduce with explicit catchall is the most idiomatic but non-obvious pattern.
